name: Larry's Tropical Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter.
3. Gradually add brown and white sugars, beating until creamy.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
5. Sift flour, salt, and baking soda into the mixture and stir until combined.
6. Gently fold in candied fruits, nuts, and white chocolate chunks.
7. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing well apart.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 8-10 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.
Note: If you can't purchase all of the candied fruits, use what you have on hand-it will still be scrumptious.
Yield: 2 1/2 - 3 dozen. Larry Rosenberg, author of Muffins & Cupcakes (published by The American Cooking Guild), Fairview, NJ.
